en_title: Disgaea Creator Slams Sony for Scrapping Discs, Says PlayStation Might as Well 'Go All the Way' and Scrap Consoles Too
cn_title: 《魔界战记》创作者抨击索尼放弃光盘：不如连PlayStation主机也取消
subtitle: 实体游戏不只是一张盘

paragraphs.en: Disgaea creator and former Nippon Ichi Software CEO Sohei Niikawa has criticized Sony’s decision to ditch physical games, and said that the executives responsible didn't "understand the feelings" of impacted fans.
paragraphs.cn: 《魔界战记》创作者、前日本一软件首席执行官新川宗平批评索尼放弃实体游戏的决定，并表示相关高管并不「理解受影响粉丝的感受」。

paragraphs.en: Earlier this month, Sony announced that from January 2028 onwards it will no longer produce disc releases of new games. This decision triggered huge backlash online, with fans even expressing their anger at Sony in the comments on trailers for upcoming third party games.
paragraphs.cn: 本月早些时候，索尼宣布自2028年1月起不再生产新游戏的实体光盘版。该决定在网上引发巨大反弹，粉丝甚至在即将推出的第三方游戏预告片评论区向索尼表达愤怒。

paragraphs.en: Noisy Pixel interviewed Niikawa at Anime Expo 2026, where he was promoting his upcoming game, Demons’ Night Fever, which describes itself as a speedrun-training simulation RPG. He also gave his opinion on Sony’s move to ditch physical disc releases.
paragraphs.cn: Noisy Pixel在Anime Expo 2026采访了新川宗平。当时他正宣传即将推出、自称为速通训练模拟RPG的《Demons’ Night Fever》，并谈到了索尼放弃实体光盘发行的决定。

paragraphs.en: "From a purely business perspective, I can understand why the people at Sony would make that decision.” said Niikawa, who was CEO of Nippon Ichi Software between 2009 to 2022. “However, the executives who decided it have probably never experienced coming to an event like Anime Expo and having someone approach them with a physical game to ask for an autograph. I don’t think they understand the feelings of those fans, and they may never have considered what physical editions mean to the people who value them."
paragraphs.cn: 曾于2009年至2022年担任日本一软件首席执行官的新川宗平表示：「纯从商业角度看，我能理解索尼的人为什么会作出这个决定。然而，拍板的高管可能从未体验过参加Anime Expo这样的活动，有人拿着实体游戏走过来请求签名。我认为他们不理解这些粉丝的感受，也可能从未考虑过实体版对珍视它们的人意味着什么。」

paragraphs.en: Nikawa then added that "If they’re going to go as far as eliminating physical packages, they may as well eliminate the hardware too. A television would be enough. Why would you need the console? If you’re going to get rid of physical games, you may as well go all the way."
paragraphs.cn: 新川随后补充道：「既然都要取消实体包装，不如把硬件也取消。只要一台电视就够了，还需要主机做什么？如果要抛弃实体游戏，那不如一做到底。」

paragraphs.en: Sony’s digital game sales have been on the rise for years, far outselling physical releases. For example, just 7 PlayStation games have sold more than 100,000 physical copies in the US so far this year. Sony have framed their decision to stop releasing discs as following current PS4 and PS5 owners’ behavior. In the announcement on the official PlayStation blog, Sony framed phasing out discs as "a natural direction” for Sony as the company is adapting "to consumer trends as the general preference for digital media significantly outpaces physical discs."
paragraphs.cn: 索尼数字游戏销量多年来持续增长，远超实体版。例如，今年迄今在美国，只有7款PlayStation游戏的实体销量超过10万份。索尼将停止发行光盘描述为顺应当前PS4和PS5用户的行为。官方PlayStation博客的公告称，逐步淘汰光盘是索尼适应消费者趋势的「自然方向」，因为「人们对数字媒体的整体偏好已大幅超过实体光盘」。

paragraphs.en: Despite this trend, the backlash shows that physical media, especially the act of owning a game on a disc, is still very important to many. As Niikawa referenced, there is the importance of having something physical to put on your shelf. However, a disc-less box with a download code inside just doesn’t cut it for many, as shown by the backlash to GTA6’s physical release .
paragraphs.cn: 尽管趋势如此，强烈反弹仍表明实体媒介，尤其是以光盘形式拥有一款游戏，对许多人依然非常重要。正如新川所说，能把一件实体物品摆上书架本身就有意义。只有盒子、没有光盘而仅附下载码的所谓实体版无法满足许多人，《GTA 6》实体版引发的反弹便证明了这一点。

paragraphs.en: From conservationists’ point of view, games getting a disc release that only contains part of the game (see 007: First Light for a recent example) or which require a patch download to function properly has been a growing issue in both the PS4 and PS5 generations. This calls into question whether there is any value at all in having a physical game that can’t even be played without a download from a server.
paragraphs.cn: 从游戏保存人士的角度看，光盘只包含部分游戏内容（近期例子是《007 初露锋芒》），或必须下载补丁才能正常运行的问题，在PS4和PS5世代都愈发严重。这也让人质疑：一款必须从服务器下载内容才能游玩的实体游戏，究竟还有没有价值。

paragraphs.en: Others in the Japanese game industry have also weighed in on Sony’s decision, with many raising concerns about the risks to game ownership and preservation in a digital-only future. Death Stranding creator Hideo Kojima expressed concern about how access to digital content can easily be withdrawn, removing the purchaser’s ability to own and use it when they wish. More recently, Kojima said of Sony’s decision that "I grew up with physical media, so I find it really sad." Nier creator Yoko Taro also echoed these sentiments in a recent tweet where he urged people to buy physical game releases while they still can.
paragraphs.cn: 日本游戏行业其他人士也对索尼的决定发表看法，许多人担忧纯数字未来会给游戏所有权和保存带来风险。《死亡搁浅》创作者小岛秀夫指出，数字内容的访问权限很容易被撤回，购买者也就无法按自己的意愿拥有和使用内容。谈到索尼的决定，小岛最近表示：「我是伴随实体媒介长大的，所以真的很难过。」《尼尔》创作者横尾太郎也在近期发帖表达类似观点，敦促人们趁还能买到时购买实体游戏。

paragraphs.en: Sony’s statements point clearly to games being digital only on the upcoming PS6, which is likely to be some kind of hybrid console/handheld, if comments from Sony CEO Nishino are anything to go by. It’s still unclear whether Sony will offer some kind of disc drive add-on that will enable gamers to play their discs from previous generations, or whether physical game collectors will just have to stick with older hardware.
paragraphs.cn: 如果索尼首席执行官西野秀明的说法可信，索尼的声明显然指向即将推出的PS6将只支持数字游戏，而这款设备很可能是某种主机与掌机混合形态。目前尚不清楚索尼是否会提供外接光驱，让玩家读取前几代的光盘，还是实体游戏收藏者只能继续使用旧硬件。

paragraphs.en: Going forward, it seems that true physical games (where everything is actually in the box and ready to play) could become a niche, expensive product, only released in limited quantities by companies like Super Rare and Limited Run, who have a long track record of re-releasing physical games on various platforms.
paragraphs.cn: 未来，真正的实体游戏——盒内包含全部内容并可直接游玩——可能会成为昂贵的小众商品，只由Super Rare、Limited Run等长期在各平台重新发行实体游戏的公司限量推出。

paragraphs.en: This week, it was claimed that , and reportedly has issued staff with the "strictest" social media guidelines to stop them from publicly commenting on the controversy.
paragraphs.cn: 本周有报道称，[原文此处缺失内容]，并据称已向员工发布「最严格」的社交媒体规范，阻止他们公开评论这场争议。

paragraphs.en: Verity Townsend is a Japan-based freelance writer who previously served as editor, contributor and translator for the game news site Automaton West. She has also written about Japanese culture and movies for various publications.
paragraphs.cn: Verity Townsend是常驻日本的自由撰稿人，曾担任游戏新闻网站Automaton West的编辑、作者和译者，也为多家出版物撰写过日本文化与电影相关文章。

summary: 《魔界战记》创作者新川宗平批评索尼放弃实体光盘，认为决策高管不理解实体版对粉丝的意义，并讽刺既然取消实体游戏，不如连PlayStation主机也一起取消。
opus_summary: 新川宗平认为，实体游戏不仅是商业渠道，更承载收藏、签名和长期保存的价值。面对索尼全面转向数字发行，他直言：既然连光盘都不要，不如把主机硬件也一并取消。
